# Cloud Computing Lab Submissions

This repository contains **lab submissions** for the **Cloud Computing course**.

## About the Code

* The source code present in this repository is **largely AI-generated by the Teaching Assistant (TA)**.
* These implementations **are not original work authored by me**.
* The repository is maintained **strictly for academic submission, reference, and record-keeping purposes**.

## Disclaimer

> The code in this repository should **not be considered as my independent implementation or intellectual contribution**.
> Any similarities with other sources are unintentional and stem from the AI-generated nature of the provided solutions.

## Usage

* Intended for **educational reference only**
* Not recommended for production or real-world deployment
